message:
feat(connectors,ui): add connector metadata methods, refactor UI rendering, and update test snapshots

- Add display_name(), icon(), and color() trait methods to each connector
  (claude_code, cline, codex, copilot, cursor, factory, gemini, opencode)
  and implement connector registry helpers in connectors/mod.rs
- Extend search query module with connector-aware filtering support
- Introduce ftui_harness module and wire it into lib.rs for test UI rendering
- Substantially refactor ui/app.rs with expanded layout, theming, and
  breakpoint-responsive rendering logic (898-line diff, +net ~500 lines)
- Update Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock for dependency changes
- Refresh 14 test snapshots to match new UI output and add cross-workstream
  integration test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
